title: Inconsistent use of nonReentrant modifier
reason: Generic pattern only; no concrete reentrant exploit is supported by the code, and the cited unguarded functions do not expose a realistic permissionless reentrancy path with protocol-level harm.

title: Division by zero in price calculation functions
reason: Initialized auctions enforce `_minimumPrice > 0` in both `initAuction()` and `setAuctionPrice()`, so `clearingPrice()` cannot be zero in the live configuration this contract permits.

title: Deprecated Solidity version 0.6.12
reason: Using an older compiler version is not, by itself, a concrete reportable vulnerability in this codebase.

title: Outdated `.transfer()` pattern for ETH transfers
reason: The cited `_tokenPayment()` helper is unused; live ETH payouts use `_safeTransferETH`, and the direct `transfer` in `commitEth()` only refunds the caller-chosen beneficiary within the same transaction.

title: Comment and code discrepancy for finalizeTimeExpired
reason: Documentation mismatch only; it does not create a realistic exploit or protocol-level harm.

title: Wallet address can trigger finalization
reason: Allowing the configured payout wallet to finalize does not bypass the existing success/timeout conditions and does not by itself create a theft or insolvency vector.

title: IERC20 interface requires permit which many tokens lack
reason: `permitToken()` is an optional helper; calling it against a token without `permit()` only reverts that caller's own transaction and does not endanger auction funds or state.

title: Missing validation for pointList contract
reason: This is an admin-only misconfiguration risk; the admin already controls whether the point list is enabled, so no permissionless exploit or unexpected asset loss is shown.
